home page
Rolled back to the state before version 54 ("home page")

In a way that smoothly and seamlessly integrates with the Services page adhering to the  look, feel, style  and overall professionalism of the site, please add the following data in the area of the services.html page concerning pricing:

Consultation & Diagnostics
New Patient Assessment: £80 – £135 (Includes full examination, oral cancer screening, and basic X-rays)

Routine Check-up (Existing Patient): £55 – £75

Specialist/Implant Consultation: Free (as noted by Delapre Dental Care) or up to £135 for complex planning.

Large X-ray (OPG) or 3D Bone Scan (CT): £60 – £150

Preventative & Hygiene
Hygienist Appointment (30–40 mins): £75 – £110

Advanced Periodontal (Gum) Treatment: £150 – £300 per session

Advanced Prosthodontics (MSc Level Expertise)
These procedures are the core of Dr. Nasir's postgraduate training from King’s College London.

Porcelain/Zirconia Crown: £850 – £1,200 (Precision-crafted to match natural teeth)

Porcelain Veneer: £900 – £1,200 per tooth

Bridges (per unit): £700 – £1,000 (e.g., a 3-unit bridge would be £2,100+)

Full Acrylic Dentures (Upper or Lower): £800 – £1,700

Cobalt Chrome Dentures: £1,150 – £1,950 (High-strength metal-base dentures)

Dental Implants
Specialized services provided by a dentist with a Postgraduate Certificate in the field.

Single Implant (Placement only): £1,250 – £1,800

Single Implant (Fully Restored with Crown): £2,800 – £3,600

Implant-Retained Bridge (3+ teeth): £5,000 – £8,000

All-on-4 / Full Arch Reconstruction: £14,000 – £18,000 per arch

General Restorative & Oral Surgery
White Composite Fillings: £150 – £325 (Depending on size and complexity)

Root Canal Treatment (Molar): £600 – £950 (Advanced equipment like microscopes often used)

Simple Extraction: £150 – £200

Surgical/Complex Extraction: £300 – £500
